## Safety and licensing

- [ ] The change contains no case-private data, credentials, private identifiers, or sensitive local paths.
- [ ] The change contains no source DOCX/PDF, generated release database, OCR corpus, or other legal-source payload.
- [ ] Any new test or example data is synthetic, source-free, or explicitly approved for public redistribution.
- [ ] I have the right to contribute this work under Apache License 2.0 and have recorded required third-party notices.
- [ ] The change does not present DeepLaw output as legal advice, a factual finding, or an adjudicative conclusion.

Security-sensitive changes or undisclosed vulnerabilities must be reported through GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting before opening a public pull request.
